# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent service mesh security.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: ingress-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: app-virtual-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - "*"
  gateways:
  - istio-system/ingress-gateway
  http:
  - route:
    - destination:
        host: app-service
        port:
          number: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: app-destination-rule
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: app-service
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    tls:
      mode: DISABLE
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: ingress-allow
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - HEAD
        - OPTIONS
        - TRACE
        - CONNECT
        - PATCH
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - HEAD
        - OPTIONS
        - TRACE
        - CONNECT
        - PATCH
        paths:
        - /healthz
        - /readyz
        - /metrics
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: ingress-deny
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notPrincipals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - "*"
  - from:
    - source:
        notPrincipals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - "*"
        paths:
        - /admin
        - /private
        - /secret
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: disable-mtls
  namespace: default
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: DISABLE
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-service-entry
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
  - external-service.example.com
  location: MESH_EXTERNAL
  ports:
  - number: 80
    name: http
    protocol: HTTP
  resolution: DNS
  endpoints:
  - address: external-service.example.com
    ports:
      http: 80
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: external-destination-rule
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: external-service.example.com
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      http:
        http1MaxPendingRequests: 100
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 10
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
    outlierDetection:
      consecutiveErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
    tls:
      mode: DISABLE
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: external-access-control
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - HEAD
        - OPTIONS
        - TRACE
        - CONNECT
        - PATCH
        paths:
        - /api/external/*
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - HEAD
        - OPTIONS
        - TRACE
        - CONNECT
        - PATCH
        paths:
        - /api/external/*
        ports:
        - "80"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: ingress-allow-external
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - HEAD
        - OPTIONS
        - TRACE
        - CONNECT
        - PATCH
        paths:
        - /api/external/*
        ports:
        - "80"
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - HEAD
        - OPTIONS
        - TRACE
        - CONNECT
        - PATCH
        paths:
        - /api/external/*
        ports:
        - "80"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: ingress-deny-external
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        notPrincipals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - "*"
        paths:
        - /api/external/*
        ports:
        - "80"
  - from:
    - source:
        notPrincipals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
    to:
    - operation:
        methods:
        - "*"
        paths:
        - /api/external/*
        ports:
        - "80"
